1.description: lookup kommunenummer and municipality geometry for Drammen

2.description: inspect distinct bygningsstatus values for Drammen municipality

3.description: get 200-year flood polygons (gjentaksintervall=200) nationwide, to be reduced by municipality extent

4.description: reduce 200-year flood polygons to Drammen municipality extent

5.description: get buildings in Drammen with the confirmed bygningsstatus (FA) including geometry and bygningid

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced 200-year flood polygons

7.description: collapse to one row per bygningid (deduplicate if multiple flood polygons match)

9.description: return the first 10 buildings sorted by bygningid ascending
